rotation_first: The cube is rotated so that the side which was before at the {side} is now at the top.
rotation_then: Then the cube is rotated to bring the {side} side to the top.
rotation_after_that: After that the cube is turned to make the {side} face the top.
rotation_now: Now the cube is rotated to place its {side} side at the top.
rotation_next: Next, the {side} side is rotated to become the top face.
final_question:
What is now the color of the {target_side} side of the cube?
Provide only the color as your final answer.
